summaryEn: From 2020 to 2022, four single-family residential communities across Bellevue, Sammamish, and Renton totaling 46 buildings, with sales projected to exceed $70 million.
summaryZh: 2020–2022 年在贝尔维尤、萨马米什与伦顿推进四个独栋住宅社区，共 46 栋，预计销售额逾 7000 万美元。
bodyEn: From 2020 to 2022, four single-family residential communities across Bellevue, Sammamish, and Renton totaling **46 buildings**, with sales projected to exceed **$70 million**.
bodyZh: 2020–2022 年在贝尔维尤、萨马米什与伦顿推进四个独栋住宅社区，共 **46 栋**，预计销售额逾 **7000 万美元**。
highlightsZh: 贝尔维尤 · 萨马米什 · 伦顿
